◈ epost_agent_kit
Agents CLI Workflows Install GitHub
All Workflows
Quality Automation

Automated Code Audit

Every change audited for security, quality, accessibility, and performance — by specialized agents that understand your codebase conventions.

epost-muji epost-code-reviewer epost-a11y-specialist epost-debugger epost-fullstack-developer epost-git-manager

Agent Chain

1
epost-muji

Audit UI components against design system — token usage, spacing, component API compliance

→ Design system violations with correct token mappings

2
epost-code-reviewer

Scan changed files for security, performance, correctness

→ Findings report with severity scores

3
epost-a11y-specialist

Check WCAG 2.1 AA compliance across platforms

→ A11y violations with fix suggestions

4
epost-debugger

Trace flagged issues to root cause

→ Root cause analysis per finding

5
epost-fullstack-developer

Apply auto-fixable issues on a fix branch

→ Fix commits with test coverage

6
epost-git-manager

Open PR with audit report + fixes

→ PR ready for human review

Triggers

↗

PR Opened

Automatically audit every pull request before review

⏱

Scheduled

Nightly or weekly full-codebase health scans

▶

On Command

"audit this module" — targeted scans on demand

⊘

Pre-Merge

Gate merges until audit passes quality thresholds

Five Audit Layers

Security

  • · SQL injection
  • · XSS vectors
  • · Auth bypass
  • · Secret exposure
  • · Dependency CVEs

Quality

  • · Dead code
  • · Duplication
  • · Complexity
  • · Naming
  • · Error handling

A11y

  • · ARIA roles
  • · Keyboard nav
  • · Color contrast
  • · Screen reader
  • · Focus management

Design System

  • · Token usage
  • · Component API
  • · Spacing scale
  • · Color semantics
  • · Typography scale

Performance

  • · Bundle size
  • · Re-renders
  • · Memory leaks
  • · N+1 queries
  • · Lazy loading

In Action

terminal

> audit the auth module

Scanning src/modules/auth/ (14 files)...

Loading: code-review, web-a11y, web-frontend


Security (epost-code-reviewer)

CRITICAL Session token stored in localStorage

WARNING Missing CSRF protection on /api/auth/callback

OK Password hashing uses bcrypt with cost 12


A11y (epost-a11y-specialist)

WARNING Login form missing aria-describedby for errors

WARNING Password toggle lacks accessible label


Performance

OK Auth bundle 12.3kb gzipped

OK Token refresh uses SWR cache


2 critical · 3 warnings · 4 passed

Auto-fix branch: fix/auth-audit-260312

> _

◈ epost_agent_kit v2.0.0
Works with any AI coding assistant
